<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\TDigest; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/tdigest.trimmed_mean/ * * Returns an estimation of the mean value from the sketch, * excluding observation values outside the low and high cutoff quantiles. */ class TDIGESTTRIMMED_MEAN extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'TDIGEST.TRIMMED_MEAN'; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function parseResponse($data) { if (is_string($data) || !is_float($data)) { return $data; } // convert Relay (RESP3) constants to strings if (is_nan($data)) { return 'nan'; } switch ($data) { case INF: return 'inf'; case -INF: return '-inf'; default: return $data; } } }
